_comment: Canonical decision packet. Carries every field that EITHER validate_packet OR verify_governance_decision_packet might check. Fill in every <ANGLE_BRACKET> placeholder.
title: <short imperative title, e.g., 'Adopt weekly family budget review'>
created_epoch: <UNIX_SECONDS_INTEGER — when the decision was first proposed>
wait_window_seconds: <integer — minimum age before the packet may be enacted. NOTE: validate_packet currently enforces a scope-based floor (adapter ~3600s) regardless of this value. See known_issues.md issue #4.>
text: <free-text narrative of the decision and its rationale. validate_packet's RED/FLOOR gates scan this field for forbidden categories and required protections. Don't leave empty.>
way_path: <one-line description of HOW the decision is carried out>
witness_count: <integer — must equal len(witnesses); used by verify_governance_decision_packet>
